portwatch_chokepoints.note: Daily AIS-derived tanker counts. Anomaly = 7-day mean below threshold vs pre-crisis baseline OR 30d avg (ports avg>=5). T6-S45: 7d mean (was single-day, smooths ~5d feed lag) + strategic ports alert at -40% (0.60), others -50% (0.50).

items.title: Russia Scrambles for Asian Jet Fuel as Crisis Deepens
items.summary: Russia's fuel crisis has reached the point where one of the world's biggest oil producers is preparing to import jet fuel. According to Reuters, Russia is set to receive at least 200,000 barrels of jet fuel originating in Japan through a complex c...

items.title: DOJ Urges States to Enforce Fuel Price-Gouging Laws
items.summary: The Trump administration is taking its campaign against high gasoline prices to the states, and it’s doing it formally. A little more than a week after President Donald Trump ordered the Justice Department to investigate possible price gouging at...

items.title: Oil Markets Grow Numb to U.S.-Iran Ceasefire Drama
items.summary: Oil prices remain stuck in a tight range as traders look past geopolitical headlines and wait for clarity on the fragile U.S.-Iran ceasefire. Friday, July 03, 2026 Following weeks of extremely volatile and geopolitics-driven trading, oil prices ha...

items.title: TotalEnergies Offers Millions of Barrels of Iraqi Crude to Asian Buyers
items.summary: TotalEnergies is offering millions of barrels of Iraq’s Basrah Medium and Basrah Heavy crudes for prompt delivery to Asia this month and next, traders who had received some of these offers told Bloomberg on Friday. Iraq, one of the Persian Gulf pr...

items.title: Japan's Top Oil Refiner Eyes a Post-Hormuz Future
items.summary: Japan’s biggest oil refiner, Eneos Holdings, will likely move to diversify its crude supply from a heavy dependence on the Middle East in the wake of the shock disruption of flows through the Strait of Hormuz, the company’s chief financial officer...

items.title: Soaring Imports Push India’s Crude Stocks to Near 1-Year High
items.summary: India’s strategic and commercial crude oil inventories have jumped to a nearly one-year high as the world’s third-largest crude oil buyer boosted its imports to a record high in June. As at the end of June, India’s crude oil stocks held in strateg...

items.title: Citi: Oil Could Sink to $60 as Hormuz Traffic Normalizes
items.summary: Brent Crude prices could plunge to as low as $60 per barrel by the end of the year, says Citigroup, which expects flows through the Strait of Hormuz to soon normalize and the U.S. and Iran to reach a deal in the coming months. “We continue to reco...

items.title: India Denies Directly Exporting Fuel to Russia, But Admits Traders May Be
items.summary: Indian refiners are not directly exporting any refined petroleum products to fuel-starved Russia, although some supplies from traders are likely reaching Russia, India’s Oil Minister, Hardeep Singh Puri, has said. Reports emerged earlier this week...

items.title: Oil Set for Fourth Straight Weekly Loss as Hormuz Flows Return
items.summary: Oil futures were on track to post their fourth consecutive weekly loss early on Friday as the tentative reopening of the Strait of Hormuz and the uptick in oil flows weigh down prices. In Asian trade early on Friday, with U.S. markets closed for t...

items.title: Japan's LNG Imports Fall 7% as Utilities Chase Cheaper Coal
items.summary: Japan last month reduced gas-fired generation in favor of coal as the price of liquefied natural gas remained elevated despite multiple reports of energy flows out of the Strait of Hormuz improving. The country generated 17.3 terawatt-hours from g...

items.title: Alberta and Ottawa Greenlight New Pacific Pipeline
items.summary: Alberta’s Premier Danielle Smith and federal Prime Minister Mark Carney have made the official announcement of a new oil pipeline, to be built to Canada’s Pacific coast, broadening the access of Canadian oil producers to the Asian market. The deci...

oilprice_rss.note: Fuel/energy news headlines (post-keyword-filter: 26 keywords). T6-S34 selectivity tradeoff: signal-densidade up, coverage down. Free public feed; no auth.

eurostat_oil_stocks.note: EU27 monthly closing stocks oil/crude/gasoline. Trend = oldest→latest non-null % change. Free public API.

thermometer.ethical_notes: Public posts only · No PII storage · ≥3 sources required for alert · 24h cooldown · alerts NEVER replace official sources · TOS-compliant

resilience.disclaimer: Indice experimental heuristico. Ref: INFORM, FEMA NRI, ND-GAIN.

comunicacoes.label: Comunicacoes
comunicacoes.note: Tema severamente sub-instrumentado: 1 de 4+ indicadores presentes.

defesa.label: Defesa
defesa.note: Tema severamente sub-instrumentado: incendios e o gap mais critico (PT/Norte alto risco).

themes.note: Decomposicao em 8 temas da enciclopedia (T6-S26). Score=None quando dados insuficientes. Anti-synthetic: nao fabrica scores. Cada tema lista gaps_to_close_priority com APIs livres a integrar em S27+.
